title: Multi-step workflow — zero-downtime column rename with view compatibility layer
migration_snippet:
# Goal: rename orders.total_price to orders.total_amount without downtime
# Current: application reads and writes orders.total_price
# Target: application reads and writes orders.total_amount
expected_feedback: Workflow: column rename requires multi-step plan. (1) ADD COLUMN total_amount with lock_timeout. (2) Backfill total_amount = total_price in cursor-based batches. (3) Deploy app writing to both columns. (4) Deploy app reading from total_amount. (5) SET NOT NULL via CHECK shortcut on PG 12+. (6) Separate release: DROP COLUMN total_price. Each phase has rollback plan. Optionally create a view for backward compatibility during transition.
